📱 Install KB Studio CRM

Add to your home screen for a full-screen app experience — opens instantly every time.

1
Tap the Share button ⎙ at the bottom of Safari
2
Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
3
Tap "Add" — the KB Studio icon appears on your home screen
